title: Public Choice Outreach!
subtitle: Just a few spots left! Lots of great speakers including Tyler, myself, Bryan Caplan, Robin Hanson, Jon Klick, Shruti Rajagopalan and more. Please apply and encourage your students to apply.
contentHtml:
Just a few spots left! Lots of great speakers including Tyler, myself, Bryan Caplan, Robin Hanson, Jon Klick, Shruti Rajagopalan and more.

Please apply and encourage your students to apply.
